company: R&A Consulting and Brokerage Services Ltd

issue.summary: Project Impact Q1 FTE value is visible during entry but returns blank on the review page after Continue.
provider_readback: The survey review page loaded with most answers blank and the two engagement fields already set to No.
Q1 was opened and a value of 1 was entered with standard fill; review page returned Q1 blank.
Q1 was retried with locator keystrokes; the visible field did not retain the typed value.
Q1 was retried with coordinate-based input; the visible field showed value 1 before Continue.
After Continue, the survey returned to review and Q1 was still blank.
issue.submit_not_pressed_reason: Provider readback did not persist Q1; final Project Impact Submit would certify incomplete/blank data.

finance_state.source: Live IFS review-and-submit and project finances readback in Chrome

support_route.subject: IFS application 10210100: Project Impact survey answer not persisting
support_route.body:
Dear Innovate UK support,

I am completing Innovation Funding Service application 10210100 for R&A Consulting and Brokerage Services Ltd, company number NI696693, under UK-Switzerland CR&D Round 3.

The project finances section is complete in IFS. The remaining blocker is the Project Impact survey. When I enter Q1, "Number of Full Time Equivalent (FTE) employees", as 1, the value appears on the question screen but returns blank on the review page after selecting Continue. I have tried the entry more than once and have not pressed the Project Impact Submit button because the review page does not retain the answer.

Application details:

- IFS application number: 10210100
- Competition: UK-Switzerland CR&D Round 3
- Competition ID: 2512
- Organisation ID: 116134
- Company number: NI696693
- Contact email: gaxlec@gmail.com

Please advise whether the Project Impact survey record can be reset, or whether there is a supported workaround so the Project Impact survey can be completed accurately before final application submission.

Evidence prepared:

- Screenshot showing the Project Impact Q1 persistence issue.
- Screenshot showing the IFS review page with finances complete and Project Impact incomplete.
- Project costs first-save error ID, in case it helps session investigation: 8e989f7ab1a86765a99d1807d00aba78.

Regards,

Gary Leckey
R&A Consulting and Brokerage Services Ltd
gaxlec@gmail.com

Draft prepared: 2026-07-11T13:05:04+01:00

controls: The email body is formal and contains no internal operator instructions or half-draft language.
The email draft is prepared with two evidence screenshots attached, but no email was sent.
No Project Impact Submit, award terms acceptance, final IFS submit, partner invite, upload or account change was performed.
This escalation asks the provider to reset or advise on the survey persistence issue before legal submission actions.
